title: Sebastian Thrun — Charlie Rose

The Power of Questions close notice

# Sebastian Thrun

See Transcript

_Friday 06/20/2014_

Google Fellow and C.E.O. and co-founder of Udacity, an online education program, Sebastian Thrun shares where the idea for online classes came from and why he believes they are successful.

People in this video
    Sebastian Thrun

Category
    Education
